message:
feat(palette): add pinned commands, favorites, recents, and help overlay

Enhance the command palette with persistent user preferences and
improved discoverability through a help overlay.

Pinned & favorites:
- Add PaletteState struct with Pinned and Favorites string slices
- Persist state to config file via UpsertPaletteState()
- Ctrl+P toggles pin status for selected command (pinned appear first)
- Ctrl+F toggles favorite status (favorites appear after pinned)
- Visual indicators (pin/star icons) in command list

Recents:
- Fetch recent palette commands from history on Init()
- Display last 8 unique commands used in current session
- Recents appear after pinned/favorites in the list
- Uses history.ReadRecent() with SourcePalette filter

Help overlay:
- Press '?' or F1 to toggle help overlay
- Shows keybindings for navigation, selection, and new features
- Esc closes the overlay

Target metadata preview:
- Fetch pane counts on Init() for target summary
- Show Claude/Codex/Gemini counts in preview pane
- Include sample pane titles for each target type
- paneCounts struct tracks agent distribution

New message types:
- paneCountsMsg for async pane enumeration results
- recentsMsg for async history fetch results
- paletteStateSavedMsg for state persistence confirmation

KeyMap additions:
- Help (? / F1), TogglePin (Ctrl+P), ToggleFavorite (Ctrl+F)

Options struct:
- NewWithOptions() accepts PaletteState and PaletteStatePath
- Enables CLI integration for state persistence

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
